abilities.description: The first $1 of income generated by REAL_ESTATE assets each year is tax-exempt. It does not count toward your annual income pool for tax calculation purposes. Family office status — old money has always structured itself correctly.

During the settlement phase, you may restructure one loan on any owned asset for free: remove 1 loan token from that asset at no cash cost. This does not count as a repayment roll — it is a direct removal. Lenders do not refuse old relationships.

flavourText: The portfolio manages itself. It always has.

abilities.description: Whenever you acquire a Tier 2 or Tier 3 asset from the market, immediately draw one personal event card. If it is HOLD or PASSIVE, add it to your hand. If it is IMMEDIATE, resolve it now. Acquisition intelligence — the Chairman always knows what comes with the deal.

During any phase, choose one other player. That player must immediately and truthfully reveal their current total loan token count and total asset value to you. This information is private — only you learn it. The boardroom sees everything.
If you do not own at least one Tier 2 or Tier 3 market asset by the end of Round 5 (Year 5), gain +1 stress immediately. Boards punish inaction. The Chairman without acquisitions is just a title.

flavourText: The board doesn't vote no twice.

t3AccessRule: Unrestricted. The Founder may bid on Tier 3 assets from game start — no Tier 2 ownership required.

abilities.description: TECHNOLOGY vertical integration unlocks earlier: owning a TECHNOLOGY MIDSTREAM asset alone is sufficient to activate the UPSTREAM integration bonus on any owned TECHNOLOGY UPSTREAM asset — you do not need the full three-placement stack. The full stack still grants all other bonuses as printed. The Founder sees the platform before the infrastructure exists.

When your TECHNOLOGY vertical integration stack is completed for the first time (you own UPSTREAM, MIDSTREAM, and DOWNSTREAM TECHNOLOGY assets simultaneously), immediately draw 2 personal event cards and keep one of your choice. Discard the other. Product-market fit arrived. Everything accelerates.

If your stress reaches 5 or higher at any point during the game, you must immediately sell one owned TECHNOLOGY asset of your choice (your choice of which asset). Receive current market value minus outstanding loans on that asset. The pressure of hypergrowth forces premature exits.

flavourText: The revenue comes later. The valuation comes now.

abilities.description: MANUFACTURING assets you own treat all negative GMI deltas as halved before the industry's standard halving applies. In practice: where the standard MANUFACTURING GMI halving would produce a delta of -1, this CEO reduces it to 0. Where standard halving would produce -2, this CEO reduces it to -1. Round toward zero at each step. The floor holds because someone built it right.

THE BLESSING — During the settlement phase, choose one other player. That player's next loan repayment roll this year (or their next roll if they have not yet resolved repayments) is treated as a result of 6 automatically — no die is rolled, and the relief effect applies: they remove 1 loan token at no cash cost. Declare before they roll. The Foreman keeps the whole shop running.

flavourText: The floor holds because someone built it right.

abilities.description: Your death roll threshold is 8, not the standard 6. You do not make a death roll at year end unless your stress is 8 or higher. Regulatory frameworks exist for a reason. This CEO filed the paperwork that keeps the audit away.

When any collateral violation is triggered on any of your assets (your asset value drops below its outstanding loan tokens), you do not gain stress from that violation. You must still resolve the violation immediately per standard rules — but the regulatory buffer absorbs the personal impact. The stress goes to the filing cabinet, not the body.

REGULATORY REVIEW — During the settlement phase, choose any one asset owned by any player (including yourself). That asset's loan repayment roll this year is treated as a result of 3 automatically — the die is not rolled, no trigger fires, and no relief is granted. The regulator has reviewed the exposure and determined: nothing to see here. For now.

flavourText: The form was completed correctly. That's more than most can say.

abilities.description: All vertical integration stress reductions printed on your owned asset cards are doubled. If an asset card lists stressReduction: 1 on an integration bonus and you meet that bonus's condition, you instead reduce stress by 2. If it lists stressReduction: 2, you reduce stress by 4 (maximum effective value; cannot reduce below 0). The Engineer specified every tolerance. The system runs without friction.

You may activate one cross-industry synergy bonus simultaneously with a vertical integration bonus in the same turn. Normally only one bonus of each type is evaluated per turn — this CEO removes that restriction for you. Both bonuses apply in full if conditions are met. Systems thinking: every connection earns.

PERMANENT UPGRADE — During the settlement phase, choose one MANUFACTURING asset you own. That asset permanently gains +1 to all of its positive delta outcomes on its baseValueUpdateRule table (e.g. a printed delta of +1 becomes +2, a printed delta of +2 becomes +3). This modification is permanent for the rest of the game and cannot be reversed. Mark the card. The machine was re-engineered. It runs better now.

flavourText: The machine works because every tolerance was specified.

abilities.description: On any year where the global event card has a negative gmiDelta (including after die-roll modifiers are applied), you may choose one FINANCE UPSTREAM asset you own. That asset's value update die roll is inverted for this year: treat a result of 1 as 6, 2 as 5, 3 as 4, 4 as 3, 5 as 2, and 6 as 1 before applying any other modifiers. Declare before rolling. The model profits from what others fear.

On any year where the global event card has a positive gmiDelta (including after die-roll modifiers), one FINANCE UPSTREAM asset you own — your choice — treats its value update die result as 1 lower than rolled (minimum result of 1). The short position costs you when the market runs. Declare which asset after rolling.

PACT DIVIDEND — During the settlement phase, roll d6. On 4–6: gain $2 cash immediately. On 1–3: gain +1 stress immediately. No cash is earned on a failed roll. The model is never quite right — but when it works, it pays.

flavourText: The model said this couldn't happen. The model was updated.

abilities.description: During the value update phase, after rolling all asset dice, choose one owned asset. Reroll that asset's value update die. You may keep either the original result or the new result — your choice. Declare before accepting the new result. Two sides to every trade. The Trader wants both options on the table.

Whenever any owned asset's value decreases by 3 or more in a single value update step (after all modifiers), immediately gain $1 cash from the bank. The short position pays out. This triggers once per asset per year — if multiple assets each drop 3+, you gain $1 for each.

If any owned asset's value decreases by 5 or more in a single value update step (after all modifiers), gain +1 stress immediately. The position exceeded risk parameters. The desk is reviewing exposure.

flavourText: Two sides to every trade. I want both of them.

abilities.description: TAX RECLASSIFICATION — During the tax phase this year, reclassify up to $2 of your income as advisory fees. This reclassified amount is removed from your taxable income pool before tax is calculated — treat your income as $2 lower for tax purposes this year (minimum taxable income of $0). This is not a loan offset; it is a structural reclassification. There are two legal systems. You use the correct one.

MARKET PREVIEW — Before drawing your personal event card this year, you may look at the top 2 cards of the personal event deck without revealing them to other players. Choose one to draw as your event card for this year. Return the other to the top of the deck in any order. Intelligence precedes the draw.

DISTRESSED ACQUISITION — During the auction phase, you may acquire one asset from the market discard pile at half its printed baseValue (rounded down, minimum $1). Place it directly into your portfolio — it does not go to open auction. Other players may not bid on it. The distressed seller had no other options. You did.

flavourText: There are two legal systems. You've been using the wrong one.

abilities.description: All held personal event cards in your hand sell for $1 more than their printed saleValue. A card with saleValue: 1 sells for $2. A card with saleValue: 0 sells for $1. This applies at all times — during your turn, during settlement, whenever a card sale is permitted. Narrative is the premium product.

INSPIRATION — During the value update phase, before a MEDIA_ENTERTAINMENT asset's buzz die is rolled (for any player, including yourself), you may declare Inspiration on that asset. The buzz die result is treated as good buzz (3–6) regardless of what is rolled — the value die is rolled twice and the higher result is taken. Declare before the buzz die is rolled. The press is managed. The story is set.

Whenever any personal event card drawn by any player has a negative cash or stress effect on another player (i.e. forces a loss or forces stress on a target), you may immediately sell one held personal event card from your hand at its enhanced sale value (printed saleValue +$1 per your passive ability). Crisis generates coverage. Coverage generates fees.

flavourText: The story isn't what happened. The story is what they remember.

abilities.description: FORESIGHT — Before the global event card is drawn at the start of any year, you may look at the top card of the global event deck without revealing it. You then choose: leave it on top (it will be drawn as normal), or move it to the bottom of the deck (the next card becomes this year's event). Declare your choice before any card is drawn. The seismic data doesn't lie.

ENERGY assets you own benefit from enhanced GMI amplification. Tier 1 and Tier 2 ENERGY assets you own apply the GMI delta twice (as standard for ENERGY) and then apply it once more — effectively ×3 amplification instead of ×2. Tier 3 ENERGY assets apply the GMI delta four times instead of the standard three. This applies to both positive and negative GMI deltas. The Geologist mapped the formation before anyone else was drilling.

GMI PROTECTION — At the start of the value update phase, choose one other player. That player's ENERGY assets treat this year's GMI delta as 0 for all value update purposes — the industry's amplification mechanic does not apply to their ENERGY assets this year. Your ENERGY assets are unaffected and resolve normally. The Geologist shares the forecast with one ally. Strategic resource diplomacy.

flavourText: The seismic data doesn't lie. People do.

abilities.description: COMMODITY POSITION — During the settlement phase, roll d6. On 4–6: gain $1 cash per ENERGY asset you currently own (including your starter asset if still held). On 1–2: gain +1 stress. On 3: nothing happens. The commodity position pays when the spread is right — and costs when it isn't.

LOAN REPOSITIONING — During the settlement phase, you may freely move any number of loan tokens between your owned ENERGY assets at no cash cost. Each token moved must be placed on a valid destination asset with remaining loan capacity after the move. This repositioning does not count as taking out new loans or making repayments — it is a free transfer. The trading desk rebalances its collateral book.

On any year where the Commodity Position roll (above) results in 1–2 and triggers stress, your ENERGY assets also treat their value update roll result as 1 lower than rolled this year (minimum result of 1). The stress and the market move in the same direction when the position goes wrong.

flavourText: The spread is the income. Everything else is noise.

abilities.description: CLASSIFIED COLLATERAL — The condition for unlocking classified bonus capacity on your DEFENCE assets is reduced from owning 2 DEFENCE placements simultaneously to owning 1. As soon as you own any single DEFENCE asset, all your DEFENCE assets' classifiedBonusCapacity values are revealed and permanently added to their baseLoanCapacity. No second asset required. The General has clearance.

CRISIS IMMUNITY — When any global event card with a STRESS_MODIFIER effect applies stress to all players (including DEPRESSION persistence rolls that cause +1 stress), you do not gain that stress. This immunity applies to event-driven universal stress only — stress from asset purchases, collateral violations, or card effects still applies normally. The General has seen worse.

CRISIS MOBILISATION — During the settlement phase, if this year's global event card had a negative gmiDelta (including after any die-roll modifier), gain $1 cash immediately. The defence contract was written before the crisis. That's the point.

flavourText: The contract was written before the crisis. That's the point.

abilities.description: TERRAIN BONUS — While you own assets in 3 or more different industries simultaneously, all of your owned assets gain +1 loan capacity each. This bonus is dynamic: it activates immediately when the condition is met and deactivates immediately if you drop below 3 industries (e.g. through a forced sale). Count your starter asset's industry as one of the qualifying industries if still held. Breadth signals creditworthiness.

PORTFOLIO REBALANCE — During the settlement phase, move one loan token freely from any owned asset to any other owned asset with remaining loan capacity. No cash cost. The receiving asset must have at least 1 point of unused loan capacity after the transfer. Cross-industry rebalancing — the portfolio manager moves capital where it fits best.

BUBBLE INSURANCE — Whenever a BUBBLE global event card pops (i.e. a negative GMI year triggers the bubble's resolution condition), choose one of your owned assets. That asset is immune to the bubble pop's immediate value loss — its value does not decrease from the pop event. You must own the asset at the moment the pop resolves. The diversified portfolio had a hedge. It was always there.

flavourText: The map is bigger than the territory. Hold more of the map.

abilities.description: STRESS-LINKED LOAN CAPACITY — For every 2 points of stress you currently hold below 4 (i.e. at stress 3: +0, stress 2: +1, stress 1: +2, stress 0: +3), all healthcare hybrid assets you own gain that amount as bonus loan capacity. This is dynamic — recalculate at the start of each settlement phase. At stress 4 or above the bonus is 0. At stress 8 or above, healthcare hybrid assets cannot be used as collateral at all (cannot hold loan tokens). Staying well is the investment thesis.

Whenever you are required to make a death roll (your stress meets or exceeds your deathRollThreshold at year end), before rolling the die you may reduce your stress by 1 for free. This reduction may bring your stress below the threshold — if so, the death roll is cancelled and no die is rolled this year. Professional detachment: the Actuary has run these numbers before.

LONGEVITY BONUS — If you survive to the final round of the game (you are still alive when the game ends, whether by round limit or last-player-standing), add $5 to your final score. This bonus is applied after all other scoring. It does not affect asset values or loans — it is a pure score addition. The Actuary calculated the odds of reaching this point. They were not favourable. That's what made it interesting.

flavourText: I calculated your odds. I didn't say they were good.

abilities.description: TRIAL DIE — Each pharma hybrid (MANUFACTURING + TECHNOLOGY hybrid) asset you own may be activated once per game per asset. During the settlement phase, declare a trial on one such asset and roll d6. On 4–6 (success): permanently add +3 to all positive delta outcomes on that asset's baseValueUpdateRule table, raise its loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue by 2, and the asset becomes GMI-sensitive (standard MANUFACTURING industry GMI mechanic now applies). On 1–3 (failure): permanently reduce that asset's baseLoanCapacity by 2 (minimum 0) and the asset becomes GMI-resistant (negative GMI deltas no longer apply). Mark the card. The result is permanent.

All pharma hybrid assets you own are GMI-immune before their Trial Die has been activated (pre-trial): GMI deltas do not affect their value update rolls. Once the trial has resolved — success or failure — the GMI relationship changes per the trial outcome above. Pre-revenue biotech does not respond to the broader market. The science runs on its own timeline.

PIPELINE ACQUISITION — During the settlement phase, look through the personal event discard pile. Choose one personal event card from it and add it directly to your hand. If it is a PASSIVE card, it activates immediately. If it is HOLD, it enters your hand normally. IMMEDIATE cards cannot be acquired this way — they must be drawn and resolved. The deal was already done. You just found the paperwork.

flavourText: The data is promising. The timeline is optimistic. The investors are nervous.
